recommendations.title: Clue
recommendations.overview: Clue finds six colorful dinner guests gathered at the mansion of their host, Mr. Boddy -- who turns up dead after his secret is exposed: He was blackmailing all of them. With the killer among them, the guests and Boddy's chatty butler must suss out t

recommendations.title: Dangerous Game: The Legacy Murders
recommendations.overview: A family reunion at a remote mansion takes a lethal turn when they are trapped inside and forced to play a deadly survival game where only one will make it out alive.

recommendations.title: Zoey 102
recommendations.overview: Pacific Coast Academy alumni return to Malibu for an over-the-top wedding that turns into a high school reunion for the books.

recommendations.title: Ten Little Indians
recommendations.overview: Ten strangers are invited as weekend guests to a remote mountain mansion. When the host doesn't show up, the guests start dying, one by one.

recommendations.title: Veronica Mars
recommendations.overview: Years after walking away from her past as a teenage private eye, Veronica Mars gets pulled back to her hometown - just in time for her high school reunion - in order to help her old flame Logan Echolls, who's embroiled in a murder mystery.

recommendations.title: 7 Women and a Murder
recommendations.overview: When the family patriarch is murdered, seven women find themselves trapped together in his mansion to solve the mystery.

recommendations.title: Slaughter High
recommendations.overview: Eight different people are invited to their 10-year high school reunion at their now-closed down high school where a former student, disfigured from a prank gone wrong, is there to seek revenge.
recommendations.director: Mark Ezra, George Dugdale, Peter Mackenzie Litten

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: Back to School
recommendations.overview: Two adults go to their middle school reunion in order to show off their success to old bullies teenage crushes.

recommendations.title: The Deep End of the Ocean
recommendations.overview: A three-year-old boy disappears during his mother's high school reunion. Nine years later, by chance, he turns up in the town in which the family has just relocated.
